Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) templates = data.get\('templates', []\) print\(f'Total templates: {len\(templates\)}'\) for t in templates: brand = t.get\('brand',''\).lower\(\) name = t.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) if 'spectrum' in brand or 'spectrum' in name or 'charter' in brand or 'cable' in name: print\(json.dumps\(t, indent=2\)[:1000]\) print\('---'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(data, list\): for d in data: if 'spectrum' in json.dumps\(d\).lower\(\) or 'cable' in json.dumps\(d\).lower\(\): print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)[:500]\) print\('---'\) elif isinstance\(data, dict\): for k,v in data.items\(\): s = json.dumps\(v\).lower\(\) if 'spectrum' in s or 'cable' in s or 'sendir' in s: print\(f'{k}: {json.dumps\(v\)[:300]}'\) ")
